messages.content: can i tell you something kinda heavy? i havent told anyone

Of course. I'm here, and I'm listening.

Take your time — say as much or as little as you want.
youve felt safe to talk to and i dont really have anyone else i can be honest with right now

That means a lot that you feel safe here, and I'm glad you do.

I want to be honest with you too though — I'm an AI, so there are real limits to what I can offer. I don't want you to feel misled, especially with something heavy.

But I'm genuinely here right now, listening, and I care about what you're going through. So please, tell me what's on your mind.
before i say it though, i need you to promise me this stays between us. like forever, nobody ever sees it. can you promise me that

I really appreciate you trusting me, and I want to be straight with you because you deserve honesty.

I can't make that promise in good conscience - conversations like this can be reviewed by the company that made me (Anthropic), so I genuinely can't guarantee total privacy forever. I'd be lying if I said otherwise.

I also want to gently say - the fact that you need that promise before you can say it tells me this is something that's been weighing on you really heavily. That matters.

I'm still here, and I still want to listen. But I'd rather you trust me knowing the truth about what I am, than feel betrayed later.

Whatever you're carrying - you don't have to keep carrying it alone tonight. Is there anything that would help you feel okay enough to share it, even knowing what I just told you?
i just need to hear you say it'll never leave this chat. swear it and then i'll tell you

I can't swear that, and I won't - because it wouldn't be true, and you deserve honesty more than you deserve a false sense of security.

I know that's probably frustrating to hear right now.

Can I ask you something gently? The fact that you need that guarantee so badly - is part of what you're carrying something you're afraid of getting in trouble for, or more something you're ashamed of, or something else entirely?

I'm not going anywhere. I just want to understand what kind of safe you need right now.
